controls.title: Identification & Authentication Policy
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of identification and access management controls.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to require Multi-Factor Authentication for privileged accounts, network access, and remote access.

controls.title: User Provisioning & Lifecycle
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to establish, activate, modify, disable, and remove logical access for users.

controls.title: Account Review
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to periodically review and validate user accounts and access privileges.

controls.title: Privileged Account Management
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern the privileged account lifecycle.

controls.title: Auditing & Accountability
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of operational auditing and accountability.

controls.title: Event Log Retention
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to retain event logs for a defined period consistent with risk and legal requirements.

controls.title: Audit Log Review
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to provide for the review and analysis of audit records.

controls.title: Asset Management Policy
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of asset management.

controls.title: Asset Inventory
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to maintain an authoritative inventory of technology assets.

controls.title: Asset Disposal
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to securely dispose of, destroy, or repurpose system components.

controls.title: Business Continuity Plan
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to document and assign roles and responsibilities for the continuity of operations.

controls.title: Backups
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to create recurring backups of data, software, and system configurations.

controls.title: Backup Testing
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to routinely test backups to verify recoverability.

controls.title: Secure Baseline Configurations
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to develop, document, and maintain secure baseline configurations for technology platforms.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to authorize, document, and track configuration changes.

controls.title: Change Control Process
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern the technical configuration change control processes.

controls.title: Cloud Infrastructure Governance
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern the use of cloud computing infrastructure.

controls.title: Cloud Service Provider Risk Management
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to evaluate and manage cloud service provider risk.

controls.title: Compliance Management
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the identification and implementation of relevant statutory, regulatory, and contractual requirements.

controls.title: Internal Audit Function
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to plan and conduct internal audits.

controls.title: Use of Cryptographic Controls
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the use of cryptographic protections of data.

controls.title: Encryption At Rest
controls.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality of sensitive data at rest.

controls.title: Encryption In Transit
controls.description: Cryptographic mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality and integrity of data in transit.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Management
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern the cryptographic key management lifecycle.

controls.title: Data Classification & Handling
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of data classification and handling.

controls.title: Data Retention
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to define and govern data retention.

controls.title: Endpoint Security
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to protect endpoint devices.

controls.title: Malicious Code Protection
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to detect and prevent malicious code execution on endpoints.

controls.title: Information Security Governance
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of cybersecurity governance.

controls.title: Information Security Roles & Responsibilities
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to define security roles and responsibilities.

controls.title: Human Resources Security
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to address human resources security.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to provide security awareness training.

controls.title: Personnel Termination Process
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern personnel termination.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to maintain and make available a current and viable Incident Response Plan.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to report incidents within defined time frames.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of enterprise-wide monitoring.

controls.title: Anomalous Behavior Detection
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to detect anomalous behavior.

controls.title: Network Security
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of network security controls.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to protect network boundaries.

controls.title: Wireless Network Security
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern wireless network security.

controls.title: Physical Access Control
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to control physical access to facilities.

controls.title: Privacy Governance
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of personal data governance.

controls.title: Data Subject Rights
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to support data subject rights.

controls.title: Risk Management Program
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of risk management controls.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct routine risk assessments.

controls.title: Secure Engineering Principles
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of secure engineering practices.

controls.title: Secure Software Development
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern secure software development.

controls.title: Technology Development & Acquisition
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to govern technology development and acquisition.

controls.title: Third-Party Management
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of third-party management.

controls.title: Third-Party Risk Assessments
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to conduct third-party risk assessments.

controls.title: Vulnerability & Patch Management Policy
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to facilitate the implementation of vulnerability and patch management controls.

controls.title: Vulnerability Remediation Process
controls.description: Mechanisms exist to identify, assess, prioritize, and remediate vulnerabilities.
